prompt: An expansive, top-down aerial photograph of a dense, vibrant emerald rainforest canopy. The lush greenery is brutally interrupted by massive, unnatural, jagged geometric voids of barren, ash-grey and rust-red earth. The pattern of the cleared land resembles a spreading necrotic disease or rigid mechanical scars carving into living tissue, with the negative space resembling a sterile barcode consuming the forest. High contrast, hyper-detailed, haunting, cinematic lighting, a stark visual representation of irreversible ecological erasure. --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6.1
insight: The systematic, mechanical clearing of the Amazon rainforest is carving irreversible, sterile geometric scars into a once-vibrant living ecosystem.
